patterns.description: Pydantic v2 requires Optional[X] fields to have explicit = None defaults. v1 auto-defaulted them to None.
patterns.impact: High — this was the most widespread change needed (61+ fields across 270 models)
patterns.solution: Automated script to find all Optional/Union[..., None] fields in BaseModel subclasses and add = None

patterns.description: @field_validator in v2 does not receive 'values' dict parameter. Validators needing cross-field access must use @model_validator(mode='before').
patterns.impact: Medium — affects validators that check other fields
patterns.solution: Convert @field_validator to @model_validator(mode='before') and access values dict directly

patterns.description: pydantic-settings is a separate package in v2
patterns.solution: pip install pydantic-settings; change import from pydantic to pydantic_settings

patterns.description: Many tests in this repo require redis-server, Docker, or the Bazel-generated services module path
patterns.impact: Limits what can be tested outside Bazel environment
patterns.solution: Focus on tests that can run with just PYTHONPATH=/workspace/repo

patterns.description: test_workflow.py calls convert_to_workflow_spec() which was never implemented. test_kb_objects.py uses assertEquals() removed in Python 3.12.
patterns.impact: These failures are NOT related to any migration work
patterns.solution: Document and skip — out of scope for migration
